text: Kicking off the Rosebud thread. Corner pair fourteen fifteen is booked for us. Send me your rough item count by the tenth so I can lay the table out.
Runners, wall hangings, and a few small totes on my side. Nothing custom in the truck this trip.
Bringing my hand-dyed skeins and a few small quilts. Beth on the west end same as last year works fine.
Any word yet on load-in start time? Grounds folks were saying seven earlier but I heard that might slip.
Grounds coordinator getting back to me later this week. Will confirm here as soon as I have it in writing.

Confirmed. Load-in is eight in the morning sharp on the day of the fair. Not seven the way the earlier note read. Grounds coordinator just wrote back. Corner pair fourteen fifteen still ours. See everyone Saturday.
Got it. Eight sharp on my side.
Reminder the Collective winter market lineup opens for booth requests in early December. I will post the form when it goes live.
